item.title: Pioneer Vintage SX-727 Stereo Receiver - $500 (Warwick)
item.description: Vintage (1972-1974) Pioneer Stereo Receiver

item.title: Kenwood Vintage KR-3030 Stereo Receiver - $200 (Warwick)
item.description: Vintage Kenwood KR-3030 Stereo Receiver Made

item.title: Stereo receiver - Pyle PT 390AU - $150 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: new. still in original box. used only once.

item.title: Sony STR-DH190 Bluetooth Stereo Receiver - $80 (Cranston)
item.description: Sony STR-DH190 Bluetooth stereo receiver in good condition with remote. Works great. I can demonstrate it in my garage. Cover has a couple little dings but front is clean and it looks great. You can stream music from your phone with this. Can run 2 pairs of speakers. Current model and sells for $200 so $80 firm is a good deal.

item.title: Pioneer VSX-D458 5.1 Channel Stereo/Surround Receiver - $59 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful Pioneer VSX-D458 5.1 channel receiver. 100 watts on all 5 channels. Powerful and sounds excellent. Has a phono section for your turntable. Very nice cosmetic condition and works great. Remote control works well and has no corrosion in the battery compartment. Fully tested. I can demo it in my garage. Owner's manual available online. Nice receiver for $59 firm.

item.title: Sony STR-DE135 Stereo Receiver 200W - great condition - $40 (cranston)
item.description: Sony STR-DE135 Stereo Receiver 200W

item.title: Denon DRA-565RD Stereo Receiver - $40 (Exeter)
item.description: Good working receiver. 65x2. Works good, looks good.

item.title: For Sale: Carver MXR130 Stereo Receiver - $160 (Scituate)
item.description: For Sale:

item.title: Pioneer SX-6 System - $250 (Warwick)
item.description: Complete package

item.title: Yamaha RX-V800 Stereo Receiver - $25 (Exeter)
item.description: Good sounding receiver. A lot of power. Has all the inputs except for HDMI. Very clean piece. Works great except is loses memory when unplugged. Price would be double otherwise.

item.title: Yamaha HTR-5640 Natural Sound AV Receiver - $75 (N. RI)
item.description: For sale is my Yamaha HTR-5640 Natural Sound AV Receiver. My bedroom is very small & we need a larger bed so we need to opt for a sounder to hang on the wall. These receivers sell for a lot more than what I am selling this for, so take advantage of a good situation. I also have my Bose speakers and my JAMO center speaker listed here.

item.title: Kenwood 999X Stereo Speakers - $600 (Exeter)
item.description: Vintage Kenwood, 999X 300 W stereo speakers in great condition. All working 5 way speakers with nice condition cabinets from 1980 Germany.

item.title: JVC L-A10 Auto-Return Turntable with Stanton 500 Cartridge - $130 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice sounding and easy to use JVC L-A10 semi-automatic turntable in very good condition. Auto-return means it turns off at the end of the record. Has a classic Stanton 500 cartridge with fairly new stylus. $15 New Orleans manhole cover slip mat included. I can demonstrate it in my garage. Great turntable for your records for $130 firm.

item.title: ION USB Turntable - $100 (West Warwick)
item.description: New in the box turntable usb recorder $100

item.title: Long range FM antenna for stereo - $15 (Coventry)
item.description: This is a folding FM roof or attic mount antenna. It is folded in the picture and is about 4 feet long and 4 feet wide when opened. Has never been outdoors, always was mounted in my attic. Picked up station approximately 75 miles away (Boston) areas.

item.title: Sennheiser ew100 receiver - $50 (Warwick)
item.description: Solid as a rock. No microphone. Receiver only. Sennheiser quality. Call or text Cliff at [24]show contact info

item.title: SONY FM-AM Receiver & BOSE Speakers - $120 (Rumford)
item.description: SONY FM-AM Receiver

item.title: Sony STR-1800 Receiver - $50 (Cumberland)
item.description: Sony STR-1800 Receiver

item.title: Grundig satellite 700 world receiver - $200 (Wakefield)
item.description: Grundig 700. $200 or best. Email only.

item.title: Portable Turntable/Record Player - $50 (Woonsocket)
item.description: CR6002A-BK

item.title: FOR SALE: MICRO SEIKI DD-40 TURNTABLE - $1,600
item.description: Up for sale one Micro Seiki DD-40 turntable in nice condition with original box and manual. Also, in good condition original dust cover, 45-RPM adapter and removable headshell. Comes with Ortofon VMS-30 cartridge. The plinth is rosewood veneer in excellent condition. I am the original owner purchased new in 1977. The turntable is 43 years old and has been sitting in the original box for over 15 years. There is a couple of small cracks near the dust cover hinges (see images). From a smoke free home. The turntable is sold as is per my description NO RETURNS.

item.title: Vandersteen 2ce Audiophile Stereo Speakers with Stands - $399 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice pair of Vandersteen 2ce speakers in good condition (cloth socks have some pilling but can be replaced). These are fantastic sounding speakers, especially for the money. Big, open, effortless sound with great detail and bass. I have the Sound Anchor stands but no bolts or spikes. I can demonstrate them in my garage. Awesome speakers for $399 firm.

item.title: BSR Turntable - $25 (cumberland)
item.description: I have a BSR turntable which is in great condition. I was going to toss it until i found out they are in great demand. Willing to sell for $25 or best offer. Last day of posting!

item.title: Onkyo rack system - $180 (Tiverton)
item.description: Audio Video Control amplifier,

item.title: Dennon Surround Receiver - $175 (Smithfield)
item.description: Dennon Surround Receiver with remote like new. $175

item.title: Gemini TT-900WW bluetooth turntable - $50 (Johnston)
item.description: Gemini TT-900WW Modern Bluetooth Turntable System.

item.title: Victrola turntable 6 in 1 - $50 (Johnston)
item.description: Victrola 6-in-1 Turntable, a multimedia center designed to play various audio formats with a vintage aesthetic

item.title: Polk Audio RTi70 Floorstanding Stereo Speakers - $199 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful pair of Polk Audio RTi70 tower speakers in excellent condition and sound amazing. Dual 6.5"woofers, 1" tweeter and bottom firing bass port. Handle 250 watts per channel. 90db efficient at 1 watt/meter. 40Hz-26kHz frequency response. 9"W x 41-1/4"H x 12-1/4"D. I will play them for you in my garage. These older Polk speakers are known to be made sturdier and sound better then the newer similar models. You will love these speakers for $199 firm.

item.title: Sony HCD-EX1 Mini stereo - $150 (West Warwick)
item.description: Mini shelf stereo system. Vintage 2000. CD,Tuner, Tape. All functions work perfectly. Good sound for its size. Comes with a service/owners manual. Must provide valid phone number for response. ebay listings show $300.00 to 400.00 current value.

item.title: 2 Polk Dynamic Tower Speakers & Integra DTR-5.4 Receiver with - $220 (Warren, RI)
item.description: The Integra DTR-5.4 is an A/V home theater receiver supporting 6.1-channel surround sound, Dolby and Dolby Digital formats, and featuring an integrated digital tuner with AM/FM modes.

item.title: Polk Audio 6 speaker set wih Tuner, cd burner, cassette deck - $400 (Contoocook, NH)
item.description: 4 corner speakers, center speaker, sub woofer speaker. Sony amp receiver. Sony Dual cassette deck. Harmon Kardon CD burner. 200' speaker wire. Has been a fantastic system but thinking about upgrading. Only serious inquiries need to reply. Please email for original receipts more than 2300.00, manuals, pics and all paperwork. One owner only, me

item.title: VINTAGE SCOTT PS69 DIRECT DRIVE TURNTABLE - $85 (Bristol)
item.description: I am selling a very nice one owner Scott PS69 direct drive turntable. The turntable is in great condition and works fine. Asking $85 or best offer.

item.title: Onkyo Receiver - $200
item.description: Onkyo Home Theater Receiver. Not much use on it, used it as a 2nd system in the house. Plenty of HDMI ports, My man cave has recently been turned into a kids playroom so no need for this anymore. Will sell for $200

item.title: Turntable to transfer vinyl to USB price reduced - $30 (Tiverton)
item.description: Brand new with built in speakers

item.title: Vintage Technics cassette deck player - $30 (Westerly ri)
item.description: From estate I bought

item.title: Vintage Zenith Circle of Sound Stereo - $250 (Attleboro)
item.description: Zenith Circle of Sound Stereo. In good overall condition. Both speakers in good condition and sound good. One channel is not working and the record player works but could use a tune up. $250

item.title: Emotiva BASX PT-100 preamp stereo audophile sound system - $295 (Providence)
item.description: Great little audiophile quality pre-amp. USB interface for powered desktop speakers or powered stereo system. Specs can be found online, perfect condition unit includes original box, manual, packaging, dust cover, original remote, and cables.

item.title: DENON UD-M3 mini Hi-Fi stereo system - $200 (Cranston)
item.description: High quality audio playback system by Denon.

item.title: AC power cord cable IEC C7 polarized TV STEREO APPLIANCE - $5 (cranston)
item.description: *See pic* IEC C7 polarized

item.title: Galaxy Audio Any Spot Stero wireless In Ear Monitors - $230 (providence)
item.description: Used only 2 times like new priced to sell.Retail new for $329.99 plus Tax . The Galaxy Audio AS-1200 is a durable, reliable, high-fidelity monitoring system that will have your band playing their best! This system includes an AS-1200T transmitter with 210 selectable UHF frequencies, stereo or mono transmission, and a backlit LCD display. The AS-1200R receiver comes equipped with a built-in limiter and a backlit LCD display. If you're looking to expand your set in the future, the AS-1200 system is designed to work with ensembles of any size, pairing with an unlimited number of additional receivers.

item.title: Wireless Speaker Kit - $25 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: Experience high-quality audio with the RocketFish RF-WHTIB-A Wireless Rear Speaker Kit. It enables a wireless (not to be confused with WiFi) connection from a stereo receiver or TV, etc. to a set of speakers. Perfect for those situations in which wired connections are not possible.

item.title: Swedish Turntable made in Sweden - $150 (Warwick)
item.description: This is a vintage Turntable made in Sweden, in excellent condition, belt driven with new cartridge and new belt, no problems no cracks.

item.title: Pioneer Receiver VSX-921 - $125 (Narragansett)
item.description: Pioneer receiver VSX-921 in excellent condition.

item.title: Pioneer HTP-101 Home Theater System Vintage - $175
item.description: Pioneer HTP-101 Home Theater System Vintage

item.title: Guitar Hero Les Paul Wireless Dongle USB Receiver - $50 (West Warwick, RI)
item.description: Guitar Hero Les Paul Wireless Dongle USB Receiver

item.title: Sony STR-D711 Receiver - $40 (Exeter)
item.description: Good working receiver. Clean and sounds great. Good 2-channel receiver rated for 100wpc. Has a phono input. Good sounding, easy to use receiver. Comes with Sony remote.

item.title: 49 byron st (North Providence)
item.description: Garage sale today 10/18/25 from 8am until 3pm. A little bit of everything. Woman's clothes and teen girls small clothes collection of woman's shoes and many pairs of boots all 8-1/2. some never worn. Kitchenware from plates to mugs to pots and pans. Dvd's, cd's, old stereo equipment. All must go. Legos sets, light bulbs for everything that you can think of only $1.00. Stereo Equipment, Jewelry, Kids brand new toys,

item.title: Bose 201 Series III 2-Way Speakers (pair) - $45 (N. RI)
item.description: I used these as my front speakers in a 5-1 surround sound system. They sound great, but I have a very small bedroom and we need to get a larger bed so we don't have the room for the receiver and speakers (all is for sale here in different listings) so we're opting for a sounder to save room. They sound great and have no issues regarding sound, the enclosures show some wear. They are a great deal for $50 for the pair. I live in Chepachet (02814) so you know in advance how far you need to drive to pick them up. I only wish others would do that. I ask how far they are & they never reply.

item.title: G1 Transformers vintage original Autobot BLASTER w/Gun & Instructions - $35 (Seekonk)
item.description: The G1 Transformers vintage original Autobot BLASTER action figure, manufactured by Hasbro during the 1980s, is a highly collectible piece from the Transformers franchise.

item.title: Dell 390 Midtower desktop - $100 (Cranston)
item.description: Dell 390 Midtower desktop

item.title: Craftsman Riding Tractor - $250 (Attleboro)
item.description: Craftsman tractor with all wheel steering. No mowing deck. Receiver hitch installed, only used to move around small trailer. Briggs & Stratton opposed twin engine. LED light bar installed. Runs & drives ok; engine smokes, transmission sticks in gear sometimes, seat is ripped, it is what it is.

item.title: Yamaha K60 - $50 (Coventry)
item.description: Yamaha K60 double cassette deck with Dolby B and C noise reduction. In excellent condition. Not auto reverse originally purchased directly from Yamaha

item.title: FS: Crestron 12 x 60 watt amplifier - $300
item.description: For Sale: Crestron 12 x 60 amplifier. This was designed as a whole house amplifier, but it ideal for home theater. 60 watt into 8 ohms, 90 watts in 4 ohms, all channels driven. This was made in the USA by Amplifier Technologies (ATI) for Crestron.

item.title: Boss Micro BR-80 4 Track Digital Recorder - $100 (Pawtucket)
item.description: Note that this is the original 1st generation model, and not the one currently available. This one has 4 recordable tracks, 8 virtual tracks, all kinds of effects and amp sims, and USB backup to computer which works great with Windows XP all the way up to Windows 10. As easy to use as a cassette player and is in mint condition. No box or written manual but I do have the manual in .PDF file. Includes a power adapter and 1G memory card with over 8 hours available recording time. In mint condition and works perfectly. No trades please. Local pickup in Pawtucket right off and back onto route 95. Please call or text I do not answer CL e mails.

item.title: Mutron Bi-Phase sound chart overlays - $75 (Westerly)
item.description: I have the 3 original sound chart overlays for the Mutron Bi-phase, a high end vintage phasor from the 1970's. These cardboard overlays fit on top of the knobs and switches on the unit to indicate the proper settings.

item.description: Wireless stereo Bluetooth connectivity

item.title: Portable Record Player Phonograph - $20 (Cranston)
item.description: Crosley Portable Record Player. Excellent condition. Works well. Can also be connected to home stereo. $25 Firm. Calls or text only.

item.title: VPI HW-16.5 Vinyl Record Cleaning Machine - $499 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful and effective VPI HW-16.5 vinyl record cleaning machine in very good condition and works great. These are $1200 new and sell for $600-$750 on eBay so this is a great deal at $499 firm.

item.title: DBX 226XSV Compressor/Gate - $59 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice DBX 226XSV Sound Compressor in very good condition with power cord. Good deal for $59 firm.

item.title: 2016 HARLEY DAVIDSON ROAD GLIDE ULTRA - $13,999 (Portsmouth RI)
item.description: 2016 Harley Davidson Road Glide Ultra, only 12,300 miles. Original owner. Garaged, covered. All services done at Harley Davidson. Additional items. Screaming Eagle high flow ventilation air cleaner, driver back rest, highway pegs, chrome passenger footrest covers, rear tire replace at 9096 miles, lithium battery installed at 10547 miles, Screaming Eagle muffler, end caps and stage one tuning kit. Quick release for trunk and passenger backrest. Additional negotiable items. Full face HD helmet, two women's half helmets in excellent condition, lithium battery charger, two men's HD riding jackets. Premium HD stereo helmet headset. HD full helmet music and communication headset, HD motorcycle cover, bladder suspension pump. Kelly Blue book lists at $21,100. Motivated seller, call me.

item.description: The Olympus S725 Pearlcorder Microcassette Recorder comes with voice activation so you can utilize it "hands-free" recording if desired. It also features fast play mode for playback that is 25-percent faster, and external jacks for a remote control, headphones, earphones, and AC power.
